     The Numbers Business Report

The Machine (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,458,331Details
International Box Office $198,605
Worldwide Box Office $10,656,936
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $497,985
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $780,315
Total $1,278,300
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set 23 years after the original story which inspired it, The Machine finds Bert facing familial crisis and the arrival of his estranged father when the ghost of his booze-soaked past arrives: a murderous mobster hellbent on kidnapping Bert back to the motherland to atone for his crimes. Together, he and his father must retrace the steps of his younger self in the midst of a war between a sociopathic crime family while they attempt to find common ground.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,000,545 (47.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,409 opening theaters/2,409 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,433,425

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 26th, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
May 25th, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
May 26th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
May 31st, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: June 20th, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, pervasive language, drug use and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2718 (cert #53618), 2/9/2022)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Unnamed Character
Filming location (country): Serbia
Plot point: Addiction, Dysfunctional Family, Kidnap, The Past Catching up with You
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Legendary Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Set 23 years after the original story which inspired it, The Machine finds Bert facing familial crisis and the arrival of his estranged father when the ghost of his booze-soaked past arrives: a murderous mobster hellbent on kidnapping Bert back to the motherland to atone for his crimes. Together, he and his father must retrace the steps of his younger self in the midst of a war between a sociopathic crime family while they attempt to find common ground.
